eb140698bc81.webp.caption: BBC image from 'Even under missiles we carry on living' — visual context for how young Iranians are coping amid strikes; useful to ground escalation analysis in civilian lived reality.

ea11828880ab.webp.caption: Second BBC image from the Iran coping-with-war article — additional civilian/urban visual context to pair with analysis of escalation and domestic resilience.

a5be239459eb.png.caption: Al Jazeera thumbnail image for UN Security Council adopting GCC-drafted resolution on Iran — useful visual for a post on Gulf states’ diplomatic strategy and how the UNSC is being used to shape the narrative/pressure campaign.

6e65bbeefda7.jpg.caption: Guardian photo from report on drone strikes hitting a school in Sudan — high-salience civilian-site visual for a post connecting cheap drone diffusion to aid access, air-defense scarcity, and escalation dynamics.

86ca2e64e0e0.jpg.caption: Guardian photo from report on drone strike in Goma (east DRC) — pairs with Sudan school-strike image to show cross-theater diffusion of cheap drones hitting civilian/aid-linked sites, supporting a ‘no rear area’ escalation/aid-access thesis.

067251201574.webp.caption: Al Jazeera image showing the aftermath/context of the Iranian girls’ school bombing — useful visual anchor for analysis on civilian casualties, contested attribution, and how such events reshape domestic war aims and regional escalation.

314f23a75686.jpg.caption: Al Jazeera/AP photo from report on Iranian authorities warning against protests as Israel threatens Basij forces — useful for a post linking internal stability, regime coercion capacity, and external escalation incentives.

84e295fbe014.jpg.caption: Al Jazeera lead photo from ‘Who bombed the Iranian girls’ school’ report — strong visual for discussing civilian-casualty events as escalation catalysts and narrative/attribution battlegrounds.

680869a831ac.jpg.caption: Al Jazeera/Reuters photo (Iran crisis / Lebanon south injury) — useful visual for posts linking regional strikes to second-order effects (shipping risk, insurance pricing, escalation ladders).

cb507ff17c11.webp.caption: BBC photo illustrating oil market move amid intensified attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz — useful as a visual anchor for escalation/energy risk premium post.

60b98d79a5a0.webp.caption: BBC photo from the same article (secondary image) likely showing shipping/energy infrastructure context around Strait of Hormuz attacks — useful as an alternate/compare visual for an escalation→insurance→oil risk premium thread.
